{{Quote|On the planet of Muunilinst, the elite ARC troopers, cut off from their original drop zone, must make their way to an enemy command center. Along the way, they must face off against the Droid Army in a tricky urban battle zone.|StarWars.com summary|<ref name="SW.com">{{SWArchive|url=clonewars/microseries/chapter/3.html|text=''Clone Wars'': Chapter Three (small)}}</ref>}}
"'''Chapter 3'''" is the third episode of the ''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars]]'' animated television series, and the third episode in [[Clone Wars: Season One|Season One]] and [[Star Wars: Clone Wars Volume One|Volume One]]. Directed by [[Genndy Tartakovsky]], the episode originally aired on [[Cartoon Network]] on [[November 11]], [[2003]].

==Plot summary==
As the [[The Muunilinst 10|ARC troopers]] disembark their crashed [[Muunilinst 10 LAAT|gunship]], [[B1-series battle droid/Legends|battle droid]] [[Battle droid assassin|snipers]] open fire on them. The ARCs return fire with both [[Blaster/Legends|blasters]] and missile launchers, and move down the streets of [[Harnaidan]].

An [[Armored Assault Tank/Legends|Armored Assault Tank]] approaches, and easily eliminates four clones—a single ARC blows the main hatch, jumps in, destroys the droids within, lays explosives, jumps out, and detonates the tank.

The ARCs use a [[Probe droid/Legends|probe droid]] to locate the massive [[InterGalactic Banking Clan/Legends|Banking Clan]] artillery piece which is their objective, and use grappling hooks to scale the top of it, eliminating the droid sentries along the way. They destroy the command tower using their missile launcher, lay explosives around the base of the cannon, and then inform [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Kenobi]] that they have achieved their objective.
